summary: Backend and mobile-web regression executed for Dyrejagten updates. Backend passes all core + new regression tests (manual naming, category normalization, location patch, map alias filter). Frontend seeded flows for species/map/badges pass, but result-screen manual-name save flow could not be fully reproduced in automation because image picker did not emit filechooser event in Expo web preview.

ui_bugs.issue: `tab-badges` resolved to duplicate DOM nodes in Playwright strict mode; requires `.first` workaround.

integration_issues.flow: Result screen manual rename + green save popup
integration_issues.issue: Could not complete end-to-end UI run from image upload path in Expo web preview; `Kig i fotoalbum` did not emit filechooser event, so analysis->result state was not reached through automation.

integration_issues.flow: Species location edit -> map marker continuity
integration_issues.issue: Editing place from species view saved municipality but ended with null coordinates in data, making map marker disappear until coordinates were patched again.

action_items: Verify image-picker upload path in Expo web preview so result-screen analyze state can be E2E-tested reliably.
In species place-save flow, preserve existing coordinates when geocoding returns no match, or clearly confirm marker removal behavior.
Investigate duplicate tab button rendering/testID duplication for stable strict-mode automation.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/lib/api.ts uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL; project guideline specifies EXPO_BACKEND_URL / Constants extra contract.
species/[slug].tsx saveEditedPlace always writes latitude/longitude as null when geocode returns no match, which can unintentionally remove existing map markers.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded user `dyrejagten-manual-test`; during validation, updated finding `7b286592-b7e9-4776-bb23-89e48c59c7f2` location to Aalborg + coordinates for map-marker verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Result-flow automation is currently blocked at image picker filechooser in Expo web. Seeded flows (collection->species->map and badges->collection) are reproducible with localStorage key `naturfinder-user-id=dyrejagten-manual-test`.
rca_of_issue: RCA-1: Result flow remained untestable in web automation because Expo image picker interaction did not expose a filechooser event after clicking `Kig i fotoalbum`. RCA-2: In species place edit, geocode miss stores municipality with null coordinates (`bestMatch?.latitude ?? null`), so existing marker coordinates are overwritten and disappear from map endpoint/UI.
